options.name: No repair / accept control balance
options.appropriate_when: Never for this case — TB control 1100 permanently wrong
options.party_ledger_impact: Miss NAGHMANA RAJA / ASIM overstated vs true receivable
options.report_impact: TB/BS AR control misleading; party ledger inconsistent

options.name: Party relink only (contact_id on lines)
options.appropriate_when: If only metadata missing — NOT this case (wrong account_id on JE lines)

options.name: Reclass control 1100 to party AR (gl_correction pattern)
options.appropriate_when: Sale reversal mis-posted to 1100; customer known
options.gl_impact: Control 1100 → 0; AR-CUS0056 Cr offset 78,750; AR-CUS0012 Cr offset 57,750
options.party_ledger_impact: Miss NAGHMANA RAJA -78,750; ASIM -57,750 (correct cancellation effect)
options.report_impact: TB control 1100 clears; party ledgers align with cancelled sales
options.dry_run_preview: Mirror JV-000204 pattern: Dr 1100 / Cr AR-CUS* per source line with action_fingerprint developer_repair:gl_correction:sale-reversal-1100-leakage:<line_id>
options.rollback: Void correction JVs; restore source visibility

options.name: Manual clearing / offset JE
options.appropriate_when: Only if business confirms amount is wrong entirely
